archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Authority & Clarity, with premium E-commerce patterns

headings.description: Used for all H1-H4. It provides a highly professional, modern, and serious tone fitting a high-end service platform.

body.description: Used for all paragraphs, labels, and dashboard data. Excellent legibility for data-heavy views.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. gap-8 for grids.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, wide gaps). For homepage, services.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps). For admin and client areas.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first grids. Left-align dense content. Optical alignment for icons inside buttons.

surfaces_and_borders.marketing_cards: 1px solid border (border-border). No heavy drop shadows. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border color darkens.
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky headers. backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark), with 1px bottom border.
surfaces_and_borders.dashboard_cards: Flat solid surfaces. Sharp 1px border. Minimal shadow.
surfaces_and_borders.radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-lg for buttons, rounded-md for inputs.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states. transition-transform and transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use framer-motion for progressive scroll reveals on marketing pages (opacity 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0).

components_strategy.marketing: Custom pure HTML + Tailwind for unique overlapping and asymmetrical layouts.
components_strategy.dashboard_and_ecommerce: Shadcn UI (Cards, Tables, Forms, Dialogs). Go cardless where possible in dashboards for higher density.
components_strategy.forms: Multi-step intervention form using customized Shadcn Form, Input, Select components.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react for standard UI, @phosphor-icons/react for marketing highlights.
components_strategy.toggles: Dark/Light and FR/EN toggles visible in the header.
components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="emergency-cta").

hero_background.description: France cityscape evening, used as a subtle background for the national coverage section.

hero_worker.description: Professional electrician with hardhat, used for the main hero section to inspire trust.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a robust Dark/Light mode toggle utilizing Tailwind's 'dark' class strategy.
Implement an i18n structure for FR/EN toggle. Default to FR.
Ensure the hero section CTA 'Demander une intervention' uses the 'emergency_cta' color.
The e-commerce and dashboard sections must follow a strict, high-density 'Control Room' grid (Mode B).
Marketing pages (Home, About, Services) must use the 'Tetris' grid (Mode A) to break standard layouts.
Always use the media URLs provided in this document. Never use placeholder services.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are added to all interactive elements.
